prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and strategic meal timing around a 90-minute morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus pre/post-workout nutrition
Carbohydrates comprise 60-65% of total daily calories
Pre-run meal provided 60-90 minutes before training; post-run meal within 30-45 minutes
All meals respect vegetarian and nut-free dietary restrictions
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Recovery and performance optimization for competitive swimming with early morning training (6 AM) and afternoon practice (4 PM)

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all three meals plus pre/post-workout nutrition for two training sessions
Includes adequate hydration strategy and electrolyte replenishment for swimmer recovery
Caloric and macronutrient distribution supports early morning training and afternoon endurance work
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (swimmer) with early morning training, recovery nutrition needs, and hydration considerations throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength gains with high protein intake; gym session 2-4 PM

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 4-5 meals spaced appropriately around the 2-4 PM gym session
Total daily protein meets minimum 1.8g per kg bodyweight (171g+)
All meals align with pescetarian and dairy-free restrictions
Plan is presented in compact, easy-to-read 1-day format
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-based athlete (powerlifter) with specific protein requirements and meal spacing constraints due to gym schedule
